authors.author: Andraé Crouch
Andraé Crouch
Bald schon kann es sein (dass wir Gott als König sehn)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Should there be any Rivers we must cross. Should there be any Mountains we must climb. God will supply all the strength That we'll need. Keep us safe'til we Reach the other side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King. Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King. Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King. Halellujah, halellujah, We're going to see the King.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No more dying there, We are going to see the King. No more dying there, We are going to see the King. No more dying there, We are going to see the King. Halellujah, halellujah, We're going to see the King.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No more crying there, We are going to see the King. No more crying there, We are going to see the King. No more crying there, We are going to see the King. Halellujah, halellujah, We're going to see the King.
